items.title: Zach Charbonnet: Gets in some light on-field work
items.body_text: Charbonnet, who underwent surgery to repair a torn ACL in mid-February, was spotted doing what Brendon Nelson of SI.com describes as some light on-field work during Tuesday's mandatory minicamp. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Alec Pierce: May miss start of training camp
items.body_text: Coach Shane Steichen acknowledged Tuesday that Pierce, who is bouncing back from an offseason ankle procedure, isn't a lock to be ready for the start of training camp, Stephen Holder of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Deshaun Watson: Starting QB decision not imminent
items.body_text: Coach Todd Monken acknowledged Tuesday that he's unlikely to name a starting QB (between Watson and Shedeur Sanders) by the conclusion of the team's current minicamp, which runs through Thursday, Mary Kay Cabot of the Cleveland Plain Dealer reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Joe Burrow: Agrees to contract restructure
items.body_text: Burrow agreed to a restructured contract Tuesday, creating $10 million in cap space for the Bengals, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Cam Skattebo: Doing 11-on-11 drills Tuesday
items.body_text: Skattebo (ankle) is participating in team drills at Tuesday's practice, Dan Duggan of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
